name: @aily-project/lib-dfrobot-stcc4
author: Vonweller
description: Gravity STCC4 CO2 传感器库，通过 I2C 读取空气中的二氧化碳浓度，并可同步获取温度、湿度和传感器状态，支持补偿、校准、睡眠唤醒与复位控制。
description_zh_cn: Gravity STCC4 CO2 传感器库，通过 I2C 读取空气中的二氧化碳浓度，并可同步获取温度、湿度和传感器状态，支持补偿、校准、睡眠唤醒与复位控制。
description_en: Gravity STCC4 CO2 sensor library for reading CO2 concentration over I2C, with temperature, humidity, status, compensation, calibration, sleep, wakeup, and reset blocks.
description_zh_hk: Gravity STCC4 CO2 感測器庫，透過 I2C 讀取空氣中的二氧化碳濃度，並可取得溫度、濕度和狀態，支援補償、校準、睡眠喚醒與重置。
description_ja: Gravity STCC4 CO2 sensor library for reading CO2 concentration over I2C, with temperature, humidity, status, compensation, calibration, sleep, wakeup, and reset blocks.
description_ko: Gravity STCC4 CO2 sensor library for reading CO2 concentration over I2C, with temperature, humidity, status, compensation, calibration, sleep, wakeup, and reset blocks.
